question: \int \frac{e^{x} dx}{1 + e^{2 x}} = f{\left ( x \right )} + c

options.a: 1 2 tan ⁡ − 1 𝑒 𝑥 2 1 tan −1 e x
options.b: tan ⁡ − 1 𝑒 𝑥 tan −1 e x

explanation: হলে, ধরি বা \text { বা } e^{x} d x=d z বা exdx=dz \begin{aligned} & \int \frac{e^{x} d x}{1+e^{2 x}} \\ = & \int \frac{e^{x} d x}{1+\left(e^{x}\right)^{2}} \\ = & \int \frac{d z}{1+z^{2}} \\ = & \tan ^{-1} z \\ = & \tan ^{-1} e^{x}+c \end{aligned} ====
subject: Math
questionLatex: \int \frac{e^{x} dx}{1 + e^{2 x}} = f{\left ( x \right )} + c
explanationLatex: হলে, ধরি বা \text { বা } e^{x} d x=d z বা exdx=dz \begin{aligned} & \int \frac{e^{x} d x}{1+e^{2 x}} \\ = & \int \frac{e^{x} d x}{1+\left(e^{x}\right)^{2}} \\ = & \int \frac{d z}{1+z^{2}} \\ = & \tan ^{-1} z \\ = & \tan ^{-1} e^{x}+c \end{aligned} ====

question: \int_{0}^{a} \sqrt{a^{2}-x^{2}} d x
explanation: ধরি I=\mathrm{I}=\int_{0}^{a} \sqrt{a^{2}-x^{2}} d x I=এবং \sin \theta: x=asinθ: তাহলে \cos \theta d \theta dx=acosθdθ সীমা : হলে θ=sin\theta=\sin ^{-1} 0=0 θ=sin−10=0 এবংx=a if θ=sin\begin{aligned} & x=a \text { if } \theta=\sin ^{-1} 1=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \therefore \quad & \mathrm{I}=\int_{0}^{\pi / 2} \sqrt{a^{2}\left(1-\sin ^{2} \theta\right) a \cos \theta d \theta} \\ = & a^{2} \int_{0}^{\pi / 2} \cos ^{2} \theta d \theta=\frac{a^{2}}{2} \int_{0}^{\pi / 2}(1+\cos 2 \theta) d \theta \\ = & \frac{a^{2}}{2}\left[\theta+\frac{1}{2} \sin 2 \theta\right]_{0}^{\pi / 2} \\ = & \frac{a^{2}}{2}\left\{\left(\frac{\pi}{2}+\frac{1}{2} \sin \pi\right)-\left(0+\frac{1}{2} \sin 0\right)\right\} \\ = & \frac{a^{2}}{2} \cdot \frac{\pi}{2}=\frac{1}{4} \pi a^{2} \end{aligned}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: ধরি I=\mathrm{I}=\int_{0}^{a} \sqrt{a^{2}-x^{2}} d x I=এবং ⁡\\theta : x=a \sin \theta: x=asin\\theta : তাহলে ⁡\\theta d\\theta d x=a \cos \theta d \theta dx=acos\\theta d\\theta সীমা : হলে \\theta =sin\theta=\sin ^{-1} 0=0 \\theta =sin−10=0 এবংx=a if \\theta =sin\pi 2\frac{pi}{2a2}(1−sin\theta )acos⁡\\theta d\\theta =a2\frac{pi}{2cos}\theta d\\theta =a22\frac{pi}{2}(1+cos\theta )d\\theta =a22[\\theta +12sin\theta ]0\\\frac{pi}{2}=a22{(\\pi 2+12sin⁡\\pi )−(0+12sin⁡0)}=a22⋅\\pi 2=14\\pi a2 \begin{aligned} & x=a \text { if } \theta=\sin ^{-1} 1=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \therefore \quad & \mathrm{I}=\int_{0}^{\\frac{pi}{2}} \sqrt{a^{2}\left(1-\sin ^{2} \theta\right) a \cos \theta d \theta} \\ = & a^{2} \int_{0}^{\\frac{pi}{2}} \cos ^{2} \theta d \theta=\frac{a^{2}}{2} \int_{0}^{\\frac{pi}{2}}(1+\cos 2 \theta) d \theta \\ = & \frac{a^{2}}{2}\left[\theta+\frac{1}{2} \sin 2 \theta\right]_{0}^{\\frac{pi}{2}} \\ = & \frac{a^{2}}{2}\left\{\left(\frac{\pi}{2}+\frac{1}{2} \sin \pi\right)-\left(0+\frac{1}{2} \sin 0\right)\right\} \\ = & \frac{a^{2}}{2} \cdot \frac{\pi}{2}=\frac{1}{4} \pi a^{2} \end{aligned} \theta =sin−11=2\\pi I=\frac{pi}{2a2}(1−sin2\\theta )acos\\theta d\\theta a2\frac{pi}{2cos2}\\theta d\\theta =2a2\frac{pi}{2}(1+cos2\\theta )d\\theta 2a2[\\theta +21sin2\\theta ]0\\\frac{pi}{22a2}{(2\\pi +21sin\\pi )−(0+21sin0)}2a2⋅2\\pi =41\\pi a2

question: \int \frac{\cos x d x}{(1-\sin x)^{2}} \quad = ?
explanation: ধরি, 1−sin\sin x=z 1−sinx=z. তাহলে, −cos\cos d x=d z −cosdx=dz এবং \begin{array}{l} \int \frac{\cos x d x}{(1-\sin x)^{2}}=-\int \frac{d z}{z^{2}}=-\int z^{-2} d z \\ =-\frac{z^{-2+1}}{-2+1}+c=z^{-1}+c=\frac{1}{1-\sin x}+c \end{array}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: ধরি, 1−sin\sin x=z 1−sinx=z. তাহলে, −cos\cos d x=d z −cosdx=dz এবং \begin{array}{l} \int \frac{\cos x d x}{(1-\sin x)^{2}}=-\int \frac{d z}{z^{2}}=-\int z^{-2} d z \\ =-\frac{z^{-2+1}}{-2+1}+c=z^{-1}+c=\frac{1}{1-\sin x}+c \end{array}

question: \int \frac{x d x}{x^{4}+1} = ?
explanation: \frac{1}{2} \int \frac{2 x d x}{1+\left(x^{2}\right)^{2}}=\frac{1}{2} \cdot \tan ^{-1}\left(x^{2}\right)+c =21

question: y=x2,x \mathrm{y}=\mathrm{x}^{2}, \mathrm{x} y=x2,x-অক্ষ, x=0 \mathrm{x}=0 x=0 এবং x=3 \mathrm{x}=3 x=3 দ্বারা আবদ্ধ ক্ষেত্রের ক্ষেত্রফল- [Ctg. B, JB'21]
explanation: A=\int_0^3x^2dx=\left[\frac{x^3}{3}\right]_0^3=\left[\frac{3^3}{3}-\frac{0^3}{3}\right]=9A=বর্গ একক।

question: \int_{3}^{2} \left ( \frac{2 x}{1 + x^{2}} \right ) dx = ?
explanation: ধরি, \Rightarrow 2 \mathrm{xdx}=\mathrm{dz} \int_{3}^{2} \frac{2 \mathrm{x}}{1+\mathrm{x}^{2}} \Rightarrow \int_{10}^{5} \frac{1}{\mathrm{z}} \mathrm{dz} \Rightarrow[\ln \mathrm{z}]_{10}^{5} \Rightarrow \ln 5-\ln 10\Rightarrow \ln 0. 5

question: \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^6{xdx=?}

options.a: sin ⁡ − 1 𝑒 𝑥 + 𝑐 sin −1 e x +c
options.b: tan ⁡ − 1 𝑒 𝑥 + 𝑐 tan −1 e x +c

question: \int_{-1}^{2}\frac{\left|x\right|}{x}dx=?
explanation: \int_{-1}^{2} \frac{|x|}{x} d x= \begin{array}{l} \text { Sol }: \because \frac{|x|}{x}=\left\{\begin{array}{l} \frac{x}{x}=1 ; \text { if } x>0 \\ \frac{-x}{x}=-1 ; \text { if } x<0 \end{array}\right. \\ \therefore \int_{-1}^{2} \frac{|x|}{x} \mathrm{dx}=\int_{-1}^{0}(-1) \mathrm{dx}+\int_{0}^{2}(1) \mathrm{dx}=-[x]_{-1}^{0}+[x]_{0}^{2}=-[0-(-1)]+[2-0]=-1+2=1 \text { (Ans) } \end{array} Sol :∵x∣x∣={xx=1; if x>0x−x=−1; if x<0∴∫−12x∣x∣dx=∫−10(−1)dx+∫02(1)dx=−[x]−10+[x]02=−[0−(−1)]+[2−0]=−1+2=1 (Ans)
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \int_{-1}^{2} \frac{|x|}{x} d x= \begin{array}{l} \text { Sol }: \because \frac{|x|}{x}=\left\{\begin{array}{l} \frac{x}{x}=1 ; \text { if } x>0 \\ \frac{-x}{x}=-1 ; \text { if } x<0 \end{array}\right. \\ \therefore \int_{-1}^{2} \frac{|x|}{x} \mathrm{dx}=\int_{-1}^{0}(-1) \mathrm{dx}+\int_{0}^{2}(1) \mathrm{dx}=-[x]_{-1}^{0}+[x]_{0}^{2}=-[0-(-1)]+[2-0]=-1+2=1 \text { (Ans) } \end{array} Sol :∵x∣x∣={xx=1; if x>0x−x=−1; if x<0∴∫−12x∣x∣dx=∫−10(−1)dx+∫02(1)dx=−[x]−10+[x]02=−[0−(−1)]+[2−0]=−1+2=1 (Ans)

question: \int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{1+\sin 2 x}} d x = ?
explanation: \begin{array}{l} \int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{1+\sin 2 x}} d x \\ =\int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{\sin ^{2} x+\cos ^{2} x+2 \sin x \cos x}} d x \\ =\int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{(\sin x+\cos x)^{2}}} d x \\ =\int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sin x+\cos x} d x=\int d x=x+c \\ \end{array}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \begin{array}{l} \int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{1+\sin 2 x}} d x \\ =\int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{\sin ^{2} x+\cos ^{2} x+2 \sin x \cos x}} d x \\ =\int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sqrt{(\sin x+\cos x)^{2}}} d x \\ =\int \frac{\sin x+\cos x}{\sin x+\cos x} d x=\int d x=x+c \\ \end{array}

question: \int \frac{dx}{1 + \cos{2} x} = ?
explanation: \begin{aligned} & \int \frac{d x}{1+\cos 2 x} \\ \Rightarrow & \int \frac{d x}{2 \cos ^{2} x} \\ \Rightarrow & \frac{1}{2} \int \sec ^{2} x d x \\ = & \frac{1}{2} \tan x+C\end{aligned}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \begin{aligned} & \int \frac{d x}{1+\cos 2 x} \\ \Rightarrow & \int \frac{d x}{2 \cos ^{2} x} \\ \Rightarrow & \frac{1}{2} \int \sec ^{2} x d x \\ = & \frac{1}{2} \tan x+C\end{aligned}

question: \int \frac{x+25}{x-25} d x = ?
explanation: \begin{array}{l} \int \frac{x+25}{x-25} d x \\ =\int \frac{x-25+50}{x-25} d x=\int\left(\frac{x-25}{x-25}+\frac{50}{x-25}\right) d x \\ =\int\left(1+\frac{50}{x-25}\right) d x=\int d x+50 \int \frac{1}{x-25} d x \\ =x+50 \ln |x-25|+c \end{array}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \begin{array}{l} \int \frac{x+25}{x-25} d x \\ =\int \frac{x-25+50}{x-25} d x=\int\left(\frac{x-25}{x-25}+\frac{50}{x-25}\right) d x \\ =\int\left(1+\frac{50}{x-25}\right) d x=\int d x+50 \int \frac{1}{x-25} d x \\ =x+50 \ln |x-25|+c \end{array}

question: \int \frac{1 - \cos{2} x}{1 + \cos{2} x} dx = ?
explanation: \begin{array}{l}\text { } \int \frac{1-\cos 2 x}{1+\cos 2 x} d x \\ \Rightarrow \int \frac{2 \sin ^{2} x}{2 \cos ^{2} x} d x=\int \frac{\sin ^{2} x}{\cos ^{2} x} d x=\int \tan ^{2} x d x=\int\left(\sec ^{2} x-1\right) d x \\ \Rightarrow \tan x-x+c\end{array}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \begin{array}{l}\text { } \int \frac{1-\cos 2 x}{1+\cos 2 x} d x \\ \Rightarrow \int \frac{2 \sin ^{2} x}{2 \cos ^{2} x} d x=\int \frac{\sin ^{2} x}{\cos ^{2} x} d x=\int \tan ^{2} x d x=\int\left(\sec ^{2} x-1\right) d x \\ \Rightarrow \tan x-x+c\end{array}

question: \int_{0}^{1} \left ( x e^{x} \right )^{2} = ?
explanation: \mathrm{I}=\int_{0}^{1} \mathrm{xe}^{\mathrm{x}^{2}} \mathrm{dx} I=\mathrm{x}^{2}=\mathrm{t} \Rightarrow 2 \mathrm{xdx}=\mathrm{dt} x2=t\mathrm{x} \rightarrow 0, \mathrm{t} \rightarrow \mathrm{o} x\mathrm{x} \rightarrow 1, \mathrm{t} \rightarrow 1 x\begin{array}{l} \therefore \mathrm{I}=\frac{1}{2} \int_{0}^{1} \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{t}} \mathrm{dt} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{1}{2} \int \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{t}} \mathrm{dt}=\frac{1}{2} \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{t}}=\mathrm{F}(\mathrm{t}) \end{array} \begin{array}{l} I=F(1)-F(0) \\ =\frac{1}{2} e-\frac{1}{2} e^{0} \\ =\frac{1}{2}(e-1) \end{array} I=F(1)−F(0)=21e−21e0=21(e−1)
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \mathrm{I}=\int_{0}^{1} \mathrm{xe}^{\mathrm{x}^{2}} \mathrm{dx} I=\mathrm{x}^{2}=\mathrm{t} \Rightarrow 2 \mathrm{xdx}=\mathrm{dt} x2=t\mathrm{x} \rightarrow 0, \mathrm{t} \rightarrow \mathrm{o} x\mathrm{x} \rightarrow 1, \mathrm{t} \rightarrow 1 x\begin{array}{l} \therefore \mathrm{I}=\frac{1}{2} \int_{0}^{1} \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{t}} \mathrm{dt} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{1}{2} \int \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{t}} \mathrm{dt}=\frac{1}{2} \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{t}}=\mathrm{F}(\mathrm{t}) \end{array} \begin{array}{l} I=F(1)-F(0) \\ =\frac{1}{2} e-\frac{1}{2} e^{0} \\ =\frac{1}{2}(e-1) \end{array} I=F(1)−F(0)=21e−21e0=21(e−1)

question: \int \frac{x^{3}}{\sqrt{a^{8}-x^{8}}} d x=

options.a: 1 4 sin ⁡ − 1 𝑥 𝑎 4 + 𝑐 4 1 sin −1 a 4 x +c
options.b: 1 4 sin ⁡ − 1 𝑥 4 𝑎 4 + 𝑐 4 1 sin −1 a 4 x 4 +c
options.c: 1 4 sin ⁡ − 1 𝑥 4 𝑎 + 𝑐 4 1 sin −1 a x 4 +c
options.d: 1 4 sin ⁡ − 1 𝑥 3 𝑎 4 + 𝑐 4 1 sin −1 a 4 x 3 +c

explanation: Sol. সমাধান: (b); \int \frac{x^{3} d x}{\sqrt{a^{8}-x^{8}}} \quad ধরি, x4=z\Rightarrow d z=4 x^{3} d x=\frac{1}{4} \int \frac{d z}{\sqrt{a^{8}-z^{2}}}=\frac{1}{4} \sin ^{-1} \frac{z}{a^{4}}+c=\frac{1}{4} \sin ^{-1} \frac{x^{4}}{a^{4}}+c x4=z
subject: Math
explanationLatex: Sol. সমাধান: (b); \int \frac{x^{3} d x}{\sqrt{a^{8}-x^{8}}} \quad ধরি, x4=z\Rightarrow d z=4 x^{3} d x=\frac{1}{4} \int \frac{d z}{\sqrt{a^{8}-z^{2}}}=\frac{1}{4} \sin ^{-1} \frac{z}{a^{4}}+c=\frac{1}{4} \sin ^{-1} \frac{x^{4}}{a^{4}}+c x4=z

question: \int \cos \frac{x}{2} d x=?
explanation: \int \cos \frac{x}{2} d x=\frac{\sin \frac{x}{2}}{\frac{1}{2}}=2 \sin \frac{x}{2}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \int \cos \frac{x}{2} d x=\frac{\sin \frac{x}{2}}{\frac{1}{2}}=2 \sin \frac{x}{2}

question: \int \cos ^{4} x d x = ?

options.a: 1 4 ( 3 2 𝑥 + sin ⁡ 2 𝑥 − 1 8 sin ⁡ 4 𝑥 ) + 𝑐 4 1 ( 2 3 x+sin2x− 8 1 sin4x)+c
options.b: 1 4 ( 3 2 𝑥 − sin ⁡ 2 𝑥 − 1 8 sin ⁡ 4 𝑥 ) + 𝑐 4 1 ( 2 3 x−sin2x− 8 1 sin4x)+c
options.c: 1 4 ( 3 2 𝑥 + sin ⁡ 2 𝑥 + 1 8 sin ⁡ 4 𝑥 ) + 𝑐 4 1 ( 2 3 x+sin2x+ 8 1 sin4x)+c
options.d: 1 4 ( 3 2 𝑥 − sin ⁡ 2 𝑥 + 1 8 sin ⁡ 4 𝑥 ) + 𝑐 4 1 ( 2 3 x−sin2x+ 8 1 sin4x)+c

explanation: \begin{aligned} & \cos ^{4} x d x=\left(\cos ^{2} x\right)^{2}=\left\{\frac{1}{2}(1+\cos 2 x)\right\}^{2} \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left\{1+2 \cos 2 x+\cos ^{2} 2 \dot{x}\right\} \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left\{1+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2}(1+\cos 4 x)\right\} \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left[1+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2}+\frac{1}{2} \cos 4 x\right] \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left[\frac{3}{2}+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2} \cos 4 x\right] \\ \therefore \quad & \cos { }^{4} x d x \\ & =\int \frac{1}{4}\left(\frac{3}{2}+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2} \cos 4 x\right) d x \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left(\frac{3}{2} x+2 \cdot \frac{1}{2} \sin 2 x+\frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{4} \sin 4 x\right)+c \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left(\frac{3}{2} x+\sin 2 x+\frac{1}{8} \sin 4 x\right)+c \text { (Ans.) } \end{aligned}
subject: Math
explanationLatex: \begin{aligned} & \cos ^{4} x d x=\left(\cos ^{2} x\right)^{2}=\left\{\frac{1}{2}(1+\cos 2 x)\right\}^{2} \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left\{1+2 \cos 2 x+\cos ^{2} 2 \dot{x}\right\} \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left\{1+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2}(1+\cos 4 x)\right\} \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left[1+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2}+\frac{1}{2} \cos 4 x\right] \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left[\frac{3}{2}+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2} \cos 4 x\right] \\ \therefore \quad & \cos { }^{4} x d x \\ & =\int \frac{1}{4}\left(\frac{3}{2}+2 \cos 2 x+\frac{1}{2} \cos 4 x\right) d x \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left(\frac{3}{2} x+2 \cdot \frac{1}{2} \sin 2 x+\frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{4} \sin 4 x\right)+c \\ & =\frac{1}{4}\left(\frac{3}{2} x+\sin 2 x+\frac{1}{8} \sin 4 x\right)+c \text { (Ans.) } \end{aligned}

question: y=sinx বক্ররেখা xঅক্ষ x=0 এবং x=π রেখা দ্বারা সীমাবদ্ধ ক্ষেত্রের ক্ষেত্রফল কত বর্গ একক?
explanation: \int_{a}^{b} y d x=\int_{0}^{\pi} \sin x d x বর্গ একक =[-\cos x]_{0}^{\pi}=-\cos \pi+\cos 0=1+1=2 \text { বর্গ একक } =[−cosx]0π=−cosπ+cos0=1+1=2 বর্গ একक
subject: Math

explanationLatex: \pi sin\int_{a}^{b} y d x=\int_{0}^{\pi} \sin x d x \pi sinxdx =[−cos\pi =−cos⁡\\pi +cosবর্গ একक =[-\cos x]_{0}^{\pi}=-\cos \pi+\cos 0=1+1=2 \text { বর্গ একक } =[−cosx]0\\pi =−cos\\pi +cos0=1+1=2 বর্গ একक

question: \int \frac{dx}{\cos^{2}{x} \sqrt{1 + \tan{x}}} + c এর মান কোনটি?

question: \int \frac{e^{5 x} + e^{3 x}}{e^{x} + e^{- x}} dx এর মান কোনটি?
explanation: \begin{aligned} & \int \frac{e^{5 x}+e^{3 x}}{e^{x}+e^{-x}} d x \\ = & \int \frac{e^{4 x}\left(e^{x x}+e^{-x}\right)}{\left(e^{x}+e^{-x}\right)} d x \\ = & \int e^{4 x} d x \\ = & \frac{1}{4} e^{4 x}+c\end{aligned} ===

explanation: \begin{array}{l} \int_{0}^{\pi / 2} \sin 2 x \cos x d x \quad \\ =\int_{0}^{\pi / 2} \frac{1}{2}(\sin 3 x+\sin x) d x \\ =\frac{1}{2}\left[-\frac{1}{3} \cos 3 x-\cos x\right]_{0}^{\pi / 2} \\ =\frac{1}{2}\left(-\frac{1}{3} \cos 3 \frac{\pi}{2},-\cos \frac{\pi}{2}+\frac{1}{3} \cos 0+\cos 0\right) \\ =\frac{1}{2}\left[-\frac{1}{3}\left(\cos 3 \frac{\pi}{2}-\cos 0\right)-\left(\cos \frac{\pi}{2}-\cos 0\right)\right] \\ =\frac{1}{2}\left[-\frac{1}{3}(0-1)-(0-1)\right]=\frac{1}{2}\left(\frac{1}{3}+1\right)=\frac{2}{3} \end{array}

question: \int_{0}^{4} f{\left ( x \right )} dx = 5 হলে, তবে \int_{1}^{5} f{\left ( x - 1 \right )} dx = ?
explanation: \begin{array}{l} \text { Let, } \quad t=x-1 \\ \Rightarrow d x=d t \\ \text { if } x=5 ; t=4 \\ x=1 ; t=0 \\ \int_{1}^{5} f(x-1) d x=\int_{0}^{4} f(t) d t=\int_{0}^{4} f(x) d x \\ =5\end{array} Let, t=x−1
subject: Math
questionLatex: \int_{0}^{4} f{\left ( x \right )} dx = 5 হলে, তবে \int_{1}^{5} f{\left ( x - 1 \right )} dx = ?

explanation: \begin{array}{l} =\int x\left(\sec ^{2} x-1\right) d x=\int x \sec ^{2} x d x-\int x d x \\ =x \int \sec ^{2} x d x-\int\left\{\frac{d}{d x}(x) \int \sec ^{2} x d x\right\} d x-\frac{x^{2}}{2} \\ =x \tan x-\int 1 \cdot \tan x d x-\frac{x^{2}}{2} \\ =x \tan x+\ln |\cos x|-\frac{x^{2}}{2}+c \end{array} =

question: \int \frac{\sqrt{\tan{x}}}{\sin{x} . \cos{x}} = f{\left ( x \right )} + c হলে f(x)=কত?
explanation: \begin{aligned} & \int \frac{\sqrt{\tan x}}{\sin x \cdot \cos x} d x \\ = & \int \frac{\sqrt{\tan x}}{\frac{\sin x}{\cos x} \cdot \cos ^{2} x} d x \\ = & \int \frac{\sqrt{\tan x}}{\tan x \cos ^{2} x} \\ = & \int \frac{\sec ^{2} x}{\sqrt{\tan x}} \\ = & 2 \sqrt{\tan x}\left[\int \frac{f^{\prime}(x)}{f(x)} d x=2 \sqrt{f(x)}\right]\end{aligned} ====
